meta.name: PRSM EMERGENCY: Pause FTNSTokenSimple
meta.description: Pauses ALL FTNS token transfers. Halts royalty distributions, escrow operations, staking flows. USE ONLY DURING ACTIVE P0 INCIDENT — token-level pause is a sledgehammer. Cosigning council members must verify (a) incident severity warrants full-token pause, (b) less-disruptive options (specific contract pause) are not applicable. See EXPLOIT_RESPONSE_PLAYBOOK.md §6.
